title: Lookin' sharp
description: A combat mod which expands the vanilla melee weapon options!
body:
Lookin' Sharp currently adds 60 new melee weapons to the game, which can all be obtained through the new forging station block!

Each weapon type has its own set of stats, allowing you to choose a weapon that's best suited to your combat style.

Rarities:

Upon crafting new weapons, they will be given a random rarity level, from common to legendary. These rarities will impact the strength of your weapon's stats, with common being the weakest, and legendary being the strongest.

Artifacts:

Throughout the world, you'll find magic artifact items as mob drops. These items can be applied to your weapons in a smithing table, imbuing them with a special ability, and adding a much needed element of customisation to combat!

Drops:

Iron golem - Battering artifact
Cave spider - Deadly artifact
Snow golem - Glacial artifact
Slime - Sticky artifact
Witch - Tonic artifact
Husk - Weakening artifact
Wither Skeleton - Withering artifact
Ghast - Vampiric artifact


Josh/Joosh - Art
CodexAdrian - Programming


**** [**Creeper Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla creepers!
[**Critters and Companions**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/critters-and-companions) A mod which adds a variety of friendly animals!
[**Ghost**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ghost) A mod which adds two friendly ghost mobs to your world!
[**Golem Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/golem-overhaul) A mod which adds 9 new golem types!
[**Enderman Overhaul**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul) A mod which overhauls the vanilla endermen!
[**Nightlights**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/nightlights) A mod that adds a variety of new light sources to Minecraft!
[**Creatures and Beasts**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/creatures-and-beasts) A mod that adds amazing creatures into Minecraft!
[**Ribbits**](https://www.modrinth.com/mod/ribbits) Ribbits adds new swamp villages, full of frog villagers!
